summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a legendary first set highlighted by a killer China > Rider, soaring Peggy‑O and a blistering Truckin > Smokestack Lightning.
review: The recording is praised as crisp, clean and high‑quality – a true Hi‑Qual soundboard source.  Fans rave about the first‑set energy, especially the China > Rider sequence, Peggy‑O and the Truckin > Smokestack Lightning jam, calling it one of the best early‑‘80s sets ever.

ai_rating.rationale: All detailed reviews (5‑star) celebrate both the musical performance and the pristine soundboard recording; only a single minor complaint about track labeling prevents a perfect score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers describe the audio as crisp, clean and Hi‑Qual SB.  No major distortions; only a note that tracks aren't numbered in the file listing.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set flows powerfully, with tight transitions into the famed China > Rider sequence and high‑energy numbers that keep listeners engaged throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar picking is described as "yum yum" and his vocals as crystal clear.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass comes in strong, providing a booming foundation.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland receives high praise for his keyboard work.
